notes: Installs perfect, did not need any workarounds, performance in game is excellent.
title: Medal of Honor: Airborne

notes:
Fix for "Graphics card not supported" on startup:

Navigate to ./SteamApps/common/Medal Of Honor Airborne/UnrealEngine3/Binaries/

Rename moha_setup.exe (e.g. moha_setup.bak). Start game. Works perfectly fine.
title: Medal of Honor: Airborne

notes: Runs great out of the box, multiplayer and single player mode. It has some fps drop if you compare it with windows version, but the game is totally playable.
title: Medal of Honor: Airborne

notes:
The first time I started it, it hung on the loading cutscene. After restarting it, the campaign ran perfect. 

Unfortunately I couldn't get multiplayer to work. When trying to create an account, it says the "Password" field is missing. I know it's not missing because if I delete a letter in the "Password" field but not in the "Confirm Password" field the error changes to saying the fields don't match. I couldn't log in with my EA account either.
title: Medal of Honor: Airborne

notes: The game runs out of the box but with fps drops. After adding PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%  in steam launch parameters the game runs like a charm, solid 60fps.
title: Medal of Honor: Airborne
